## Task Tracker – Sajid

| 1 Infrastructure | Configure a Railway staging/test environment to allow testing of future code changes before deploying them to production. |
| :---- | ----- |
| 2 Change | Change www.unifleet.asia so it **directs users to the** **Booking page** instead of the Admin Dashboard. Fix so that [unifleet.asia](http://unifleet.asia) goes to our site; currently, only [www.unifleet.asia](http://www.unifleet.asia) goes to our site |
| 3 Change | Add **password protection/authentication to Admin dashboard** to prevent unauthorized access. |
| 4 Change | Add a **"Register Vehicle" button/link on the Booking page** for users who need to register a vehicle before making a booking. |
| 5 Bug | **Fix Dashboard Records** Display \- *(no records are being shown)* |
| 6 Bug | **Add Payment QR Code** After Order Submission \- [BDO QR Code.png](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DPtf_puhERgh2VFwTQqEQb77-3Yh97zB/view?usp=sharing) |
| 7 Bug | **Update the Booking page** so stations with no available discounts are hidden from users. ![][image1]  |
| 8 Bug | C**orrect the alignment** / layout of the Acknowledgement section   ![][image2]  |
| 8 Bug | **Add the Live Discount Calculator Preview** \- Implement the live booking cost preview and confirmation summary to improve the booking experience. ***Reference Git commit:*** **booking UX: live preview \+ confirmation summary \+ improved flow** → this was previously implemented, but cannot be found in original Replit sandbox ![][image3] |
| 10 Change | **Hide Fuel Type Field**  (“Diesel”) Under "Add New Driver"  \- *Note: This change should be implemented carefully to avoid affecting related functionality. We will offer both Diesel & Gasoline to users, but that selection can be done on the Booking page, not this Registration page. * ![][image4] |
| 11 Bug | **Fix Google Maps Integration** \- Resolve the Google Maps API connection/permissions issue that is preventing the map from functioning correctly. [https://www.google.com/maps/d/u/0/viewer?mid=1YTyyRvSx1Fan8bbrnRsMBZuIDbrVC7Y\&ll=14.584400719244774%2C120.88313550000002\&z=10](https://www.google.com/maps/d/u/0/viewer?mid=1YTyyRvSx1Fan8bbrnRsMBZuIDbrVC7Y&ll=14.584400719244774%2C120.88313550000002&z=10)    	![][image5] |
